modmenu.descriptionTranslation.arsnouvea: A small addon for Ars Nouveau that disables auto-focus on the Storage Lectern search box.
arsnouveaulecterntweaks.config.title: Ars Nouveau Lectern Tweaks Configuration
arsnouveaulecterntweaks.config.disableAu: Disable auto-focus on the Storage Lectern search box. When enabled, you must click the search box to type in it.
